Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Reroute at Damen & Ainslie
ShortDescription: #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via  Damen, Lawrence, Ashland, over regular route due to street blockage near Damen/Ainslie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:

Headline: #8 Halsted, #20 Madison and #126 Jackson buses Temporary Reroute near Union Park
ShortDescription: #8 Halsted, #20 Madison and #126 Jackson buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockages near Union Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#8 Halsted, #20 Madison and #126 Jackson buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockages near Union Park.

#8 Halsted buses will operate via:
Northbound buses will operate via Halsted, Harrison, Ashland, Division, Halsted and over normal route.
Southbound buses will operate via Halsted, Division, Ashland, Harrison, Halsted and over normal route. 

Eastbound #20 Madison buses will operate via Madison, Ashland, Harrison, Jefferson, Monroe, Michigan, Madison and over normal route

Eastbound #126 Jackson buses will operate via Jackson, Ashland, Harrison, Jefferson, Jackson and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.
